_meta.description: Navigate to the user accounts reporting page and capture key metrics including 2FA status, password compliance, storage usage, and last login dates.

base_url.description: Base URL for Google Admin Console

auth.note: Google Admin requires manual login with password + optional 2FA. Ensure the admin account is already signed in at admin.google.com before running.

_meta.warning: Requires active admin session at admin.google.com.

verificationStrategy.pre: Navigate to the user accounts reporting page and wait for the table to load
verificationStrategy.post: Read the reporting table to extract metrics on user count, 2FA enrollment, password compliance, and storage usage
verificationStrategy.primaryVerification: Captures reporting data including user metrics, security posture, and storage breakdown

reporting-nav-item.description: Reporting section link in sidebar navigation

chain.note: Navigate directly to the user accounts reporting page in Google Admin
Wait for the reporting table to fully load
Read the reporting table to identify column headers and data rows, look for user count, 2FA status, password strength, and storage usage

candidates: h1:has-text('User accounts'), h2:has-text('User accounts'), [role='heading'] span:has-text('User accounts')
chain.note: Capture the report title and timestamp
Capture the user data table rows for metric extraction
Locate and capture the 2-Step Verification enrollment column
Locate and capture the password compliance column
Locate and capture the storage usage column
Locate and capture the last login date column
Review the full table to count users and assess overall security posture from visible data
Return to home page to complete the reporting workflow
